entity.summary: India-based centralized cryptocurrency exchange that went live on December 14, 2017 and later acknowledged a February 2022 security incident affecting exchange funds.
entity.notes: Bitbns' official About page gives an exact go-live date of December 14, 2017. In March 2023, contemporaneous reporting said the CEO acknowledged that exchange funds had been compromised in February 2022. HEI records the incident without treating it as a terminal status change.

events.title: Bitbns went live
events.description: Bitbns launched its cryptocurrency exchange service on December 14, 2017.
events.notes: The exact launch date is stated by the official company history.

events.title: Bitbns reported a February 2022 security incident
events.description: Bitbns later acknowledged that exchange funds had been compromised in a February 2022 security incident.
events.notes: The reviewed reports establish the month but not the exact incident day, so February 1 is used as a month-level placeholder. The exchange remained active.

evidence.title: Bitbns official website
evidence.notes: Official domain verifies the current Bitbns identity and active exchange service.

evidence.title: CoinPaprika exchange reference for Bitbns
evidence.notes: Independent exchange directory reference corroborates the Bitbns identity.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for Bitbns
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile corroborates the Bitbns exchange identity.

evidence.title: About BNS
evidence.notes: Official company history states that BNS went live on December 14, 2017.

evidence.title: Indian crypto exchange Bitbns says law enforcement advised against making hack public
evidence.notes: Report quotes the Bitbns CEO acknowledging that the incident occurred in February 2022.

evidence.title: Crypto exchange Bitbns admits partial fund compromise
evidence.notes: Contemporaneous report records Bitbns' admission that exchange funds had been compromised.
